title: MailerLite vs Omnisend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite and Omnisend. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your business best.
intro: MailerLite and Omnisend are both popular email marketing platforms with free tiers, but they serve different audiences. MailerLite focuses on simplicity and affordability for small businesses, while Omnisend specializes in omnichannel marketing for e-commerce brands. Understanding their strengths will help you choose the right tool for your needs.

comparison_table.tool_a: Drag-drop editor, landing pages, pop-ups, surveys
comparison_table.tool_b: SMS, push notifications, omnichannel automation, product picker

choose_a_if: You're a small business or freelancer with a tight budget
You want an intuitive drag-and-drop editor and landing pages
You need 1,000+ free subscribers without paying
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store and need SMS alongside email
You want omnichannel automation across email, SMS, and push notifications
You need advanced segmentation and pre-built e-commerce workflows

faq.a: It depends on your needs. MailerLite is better for budget-conscious small businesses and freelancers seeking simplicity, with a more generous free tier and lower pricing. Omnisend is better for e-commerce brands that need integrated SMS and omnichannel capabilities. Both have strong ratings (MailerLite: 4.6/5 on G2, Omnisend: 4.6/5 on Trustpilot).

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Omnisend?
faq.a: MailerLite is more affordable overall. It offers a free tier for 1,000 subscribers and starts paid plans at $9/month, while Omnisend limits free subscribers to 250 and starts at $16/month. For budget-conscious users, MailerLite provides better value.

faq.q: Can I switch from Omnisend to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate your email list from Omnisend to MailerLite. Both platforms support standard CSV exports and imports. However, you'll lose SMS and push notification data during the switch, so plan accordingly if those features are important to your campaigns.
